name: Ticket Issuance Contract and Idempotency Model
primary_area: Architecture / Tickets / Issuance Idempotency / Cross-Boundary Contract
implementation_code_allowed: no production issuance implementation; docs, contract tests, and optional stubs/specs only if existing repo conventions support them

transaction_model_decision.preferred: single Repo transaction if Ash Sales and existing Attendees share one Repo
transaction_model_decision.fallback: durable saga/recovery model if Sales and Attendees cannot share one transaction

required_locks: order row lock or advisory lock keyed by order id/public_reference
unique attendee source/source_reference or VS-02 equivalent
unique attendee_id on TicketIssue where attendee_id is not null
Oban uniqueness by sales_order_id as noise reduction only
required_constraints: sales_ticket_issues.unique(attendee_id) where attendee_id is not null
attendees.unique(source, source_reference) or approved VS-02 equivalent
forbidden_changes: scanner route or scanner hot-path change

contract_presence: RED no issuer contract document exists
GREEN VS-09A contract document exists and names selected transaction/saga model
GREEN preconditions cover order, payment, checkout/inventory, attendee origin, and tokens
boundary: RED controller/webhook/LiveView/WhatsApp/payment worker directly creates Attendee or TicketIssue records
GREEN only FastCheck.Tickets.Issuer is approved to coordinate future issuing
RED VS-09A creates Attendee or TicketIssue records from paid orders
GREEN VS-09A only defines contract/docs/optional stubs/specs/tests
idempotency: RED duplicate IssueTicketsWorker execution can create duplicate issuance units by contract
GREEN DB uniqueness and deterministic issuance units make duplicate execution idempotent
RED line_item_sequence generated from race-prone count
RED already ticket_issued causes retry loop
GREEN already ticket_issued returns idempotent success
partial_failure: RED existing Attendee without TicketIssue has no recovery path
GREEN retry links existing Attendee to TicketIssue or manual_review with reason
RED one failed ticket in multi-ticket order marks full ticket_issued
GREEN partial issuance becomes partially_issued or manual_review with counts
security_logging: RED issuer logs PII, plaintext tokens, raw provider payloads, Paystack access_code, or authorization_url
GREEN issuer logs only sanitized ids, counts, correlation_id, idempotency_key, and reason codes

hot_data: IssueTicketsWorker uniqueness and order-level lock contention
warm_data: future event sync aggregation handled by VS-10
cold_data: orders, order_lines, payment_attempts, checkout_sessions, attendees, ticket_issues, state_transitions
redis_structures: none in VS-09A; no direct Redis mutation allowed
performance_scaling_review.ttl_strategy: none in VS-09A; delivery token expiry comes from VS-08 and secure page behavior from VS-11
invalidation_triggers: future TicketIssue issued -> admin/order cache invalidation
future Attendee created -> event sync aggregation via VS-10
future revocation/refund -> secure ticket/scanner invalidation via VS-15A
pubsub_rules: none in VS-09A; future broadcasts must happen after durable state changes only
indexes_required: sales_ticket_issues unique(attendee_id) where attendee_id is not null
attendees unique(source, source_reference) or VS-02 equivalent
